jobDescription.title: Job Description
jobDescription.text: We are seeking a collaborative and highly motivated Digital Marketing Specialist to execute and support our global digital outbound marketing programs. The ideal candidate is a skilled growth and demand generation contributor who is recognized as a reliable resource. You will support the execution of complex, cross-functional programs, contributing to top-of-funnel growth through outbound channel diversification and implementing methods to streamline virtual experiences and user acquisition.&

qualifications.title: Qualifications
qualifications.text:
• 4-6 years of B2B marketing experience with deep, hands-on expertise in global demand generation and new business acquisition campaigns
  • Demonstrated proficiency in defining and executing strategies across digital marketing channels and tools (e.g., LinkedIn, GDN, SEM, Marketo, Salesforce)
  • Exceptional analytical and problem-solving skills, with a proven ability to interpret complex, multi-dimensional campaign, pipeline, and revenue data, turning insights into organizational
